quotes.text:
RESILIENT
Stay as strong as evergreen trees.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
TRUST
The robin trusts her wings, not the branch she sits on.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
UNCERTAINTY
The shades of grey within the fog will eventually lift.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
LEARN
Take a lesson from the owls; deeply observe the night, and you'll become a little wiser in the day.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
WOODS
Be like the woods—calm, soothing, mysterious and full of life.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
FORBEARANCE
Do not be deterred by the thorn amidst the roses.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
LET GO
Enjoy the pulsing light of the firefly but don't hold on too tight.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
LIGHT
Look to the space between the trees for answers.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
SURPRISES
Under the most ordinary stone is an undisturbed garden.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
ORIGINS
Remember your roots.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
PATH
Wander on the path less travelled; what you find might surprise you.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
PATIENCE
Everything can be accomplished at nature's pace.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
RECONNECT
Secrets lurk in the captive shadows deep in the woods.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
RENEW
Nature continuously renews itself, year after year.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
ADVENTURE
Live wild and free.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
CAUTION
Tread softly so as not to disturb the woodland floor.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
CHANGE
Falling leaves do not signify the end, but the beginning of a fruitful season.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
CLEANSE
Wash your weary spirit clean and take a walk in the wooded glades.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
CLEARING
Make room for growth.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
DANCE
Allow yourself some fun each day, just as the sun dances with the moon each night.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
FLOW
Go with the flow as water trickles down a stream. Do not hurry.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
FRIENDS
The most unlikely friendships can form; like variegated lichens on hard rock, they create a tight bond.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
GROUNDED
Keep to your roots and stand taller than the trees.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
GROWTH
The tallest oak tree once started as a seedling. Don't be afraid to start something new.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
HOPE
An idea, like a single acorn, can start a wondrous forest.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
HUMILITY
Flowers are unaware of each other's beauty; they bloom regardless.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
OPPORTUNITIES
Unfurl like a fern even without warm sunlight.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
MUSIC
There is a melody to be heard in the deepest parts of the woods, if only we listen.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
IDYLL HOURS
Take some time out to lie on the emerald grass.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
JOURNEY
Branch out to new worlds.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
JOY
Spread seeds of joy like a wildflower and, no doubt, you will revel in the result.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
KINDNESS
Take respite by a pond and be kind to yourself and others.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
RISK
Learn to grow wherever you are planted.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
STRENGTH
When your roots are deep, you need not fear the storm.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
WISH
Make a wish with a dandelion in the wind.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
TEACH
Inspire others and let nature be your greatest teacher.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
THE NIGHT
Find comfort in the night, where the world switches off and the stars burn bright.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
TRANSFORM
Emerge with beauty and grace from your cocoon.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
TIME
Embrace the dew drops of life before they disappear with the morning sun.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text:
RETREAT
Spoil yourself in the morning mist. Breathe in nature's sweet scents.
quotes.author: Unknown
